name: Broiled Fish with Deviled Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the fish fillets on a buttered broiler pan.
2. Brush the fillets with the melted butter and broil for 8 to 10 minutes or until the fish flakes easily with a fork.
3. Combine the remaining ingredients in a bowl, blending well.
4. Spoon the mixture onto the fish fillets and broil an additional 2 to 4 minutes or until the cheddar begins to melt and is lightly browned.
